---
name: create-instructions
description: Describe when to use this prompt
agent: instructions-generator
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Take the informaiton below and generate an agent instructions .md file for it in the /docs direcvtory. If a .md filename is provided, use that, otherwise generate an appropriate filename based on generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise and not too long. Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to reference this new docs file. If no information is provided below, prompt the user to give the ncessary details about the layre of architecture or coding standards to document.
